user_query: breach of contract for delayed delivery causing financial losses

cases.title: Enercon Gmbh vs Enercon (India) Ltd on 20 August, 2015
cases.analysis_summary:
The final judgment detailed in the provided context concerned the procedural validity of an earlier decision made by the Company Law Board (the "learned member").

**Outcome of the Appeal and Successful Party:**

The Appellants, **EG** (Enviro Group), were the successful party in this appeal, as the court agreed with their primary submission that the original order was flawed and required reconsideration (64015856, chunk 35).

**Final Judgment and Ruling:**
